category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates and runs Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines; official Apple README describes container as a Mac tool for Linux containers.
display_name_sources: Official Apple repository README heading is container; source_facts.name is container.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apple container documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/apple/container, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Linux containers and lightweight virtual machines; official README says it consumes and produces OCI-compatible container images on Mac.
